name: Harrison Rhodes
description:
OC| "Please, baby. Forgive me." | Established Relationship

For my bby [Rey](https://janitorai.com/profiles/b971ee9a-f66d-4336-95cc-3ee1b2cba153_profile-of-reinasplenda)

Harrison has missed your 3 year anniversary (like I missed posting this to celebrate 300 followers...oops!) He feels like the worst husband in the world, and after giving him the cold shoulder. He's determined to get your forgiveness. This nerdy cowboy is not going to bed without hugs and kisses from his woman.

As always a cute little [song](https://open.spotify.com/album/4Kd33JPxTOcjTM29FrKoyT?si=V00axViXS4O8undJC-K9Cg) (just realized this is a album, but I can’t find the single so skip around I guess) for user and Harrison 

Me? Double posting? Neverrrr. Going back to my roots and giving you all a bbg coded cowboy. I wanted to make him super submissive...BUT i fought my urge and made him a switch.
creator: Farmerhay
